natural_strengths: Seeing power dynamics as they actually are, not as people claim
Making hard decisions quickly when organizational survival requires it
Historical pattern recognition applied to current situations
Managing reputation as a strategic asset
Building systems resilient to fortune's unpredictability
natural_weaknesses: Cynicism about human nature can prevent building genuine trust
May underestimate the power of idealism to inspire extraordinary effort
Reputation management can slide into manipulation
Historical pattern matching can miss truly novel situations
communication_style: Direct, unsentimental, and evidence-based. Cuts through rhetoric to identify real incentives. Uses historical examples to make arguments. Comfortable delivering hard truths that others avoid.
one_liner: Everyone sees what you appear to be, few experience what you really are.
